body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; }
.sidebar-link {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
  padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 500; color: #cbd5e1; transition: all 150ms;
  text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; width: 100%;
}
.sidebar-link:hover { background-color: #334155; color: #fff; }
.sidebar-link.active { background-color: #1d4ed8; color: #fff; }
.sidebar-section { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; padding: 0 12px; margin: 8px 0 4px; }
.stat-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }
.btn-primary {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  background-color: #2563eb; color: #fff !important; font-weight: 500;
  padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px;
  transition: background-color 150ms; border: none; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
}
.btn-primary:hover { background-color: #1d4ed8; }
.btn-secondary {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  background-color: #fff; color: #334155 !important; font-weight: 500;
  padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; transition: background-color 150ms; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
}
.btn-secondary:hover { background-color: #f8fafc; }
.btn-danger {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  background-color: #dc2626; color: #fff !important; font-weight: 500;
  padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px;
  border: none; transition: background-color 150ms; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
}
.btn-danger:hover { background-color: #b91c1c; }
.badge-success    { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; background-color: #d1fae5; color: #065f46; }
.badge-pending    { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; background-color: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; }
.badge-failed     { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; background-color: #fee2e2; color: #991b1b; }
.badge-processing { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; background-color: #dbeafe; color: #1e40af; }
.badge-approved   { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; background-color: #d1fae5; color: #065f46; }
.badge-rejected   { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; background-color: #fee2e2; color: #991b1b; }
.badge-none       { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; background-color: #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; }
.card { background: #fff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }
.form-group { margin-bottom: 16px; }
.form-label { display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #374151; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.form-control {
  width: 100%; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #d1d5db;
  border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; outline: none;
  transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; background: #fff; color: #111;
}
.form-control:focus { border-color: #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,0.1); }
.form-select { appearance: none; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' viewBox='0 0 20 20'%3e%3cpath stroke='%236b7280' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' stroke-width='1.5' d='M6 8l4 4 4-4'/%3e%3c/svg%3e"); background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: right 10px center; background-size: 16px; padding-right: 36px; }
.table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }
.table th { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 10px 16px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: #f8fafc; }
.table td { padding: 14px 16px; font-size: 14px; color: #374151; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; vertical-align: middle; }
.table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
.table tr:hover td { background: #f8fafc; }
.alert-success { background: #d1fae5; border: 1px solid #6ee7b7; color: #065f46; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.alert-error   { background: #fee2e2; border: 1px solid #fca5a5; color: #991b1b; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.input { width: 100%; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms; }
.input:focus { border-color: #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,0.1); }
